name: epistemic-session-race
summary: Replace single-file ~/.claude/.current-session with per-claude-PID markers (claude PID resolved via process-tree traversal), storing Claude Code's stdin session_id as identity. Centralized via scripts/epistemic-marker.sh helper sourced by all 13+ consumers. 3 confirmed incidents on 2026-05-01.

key_decisions: Marker scheme deferred to Stage 2 empirical gates

key_decisions_rev2: Marker key: per-claude-PID, claude PID resolved via process-tree traversal (epistemic_claude_main_pid helper)
Discovery scaffolding: PPID chain walk; Identity: session_id from stdin (stored in marker contents)
Resume case works correctly: marker filename changes (new claude PID) but SESSION_ID inside is preserved → epistemic.json pairs correctly
uuidgen fallback REMOVED — if stdin parse fails, no marker, stderr warning, fail-open
Single helper mechanism — no per-file inline fallbacks (CF-10)
Two-condition sweep: /proc/$PID exists AND comm=claude (defends PID-reuse)

empirical_resolutions_rev2.Q1: Hook hierarchy: claude → sh → hook (probe v2). Bash tool hierarchy: claude → bash. Process-tree traversal works in both.
empirical_resolutions_rev2.Q2: SessionEnd stdin contains session_id + reason field (probe v2). WU3 fallback validated.
empirical_resolutions_rev2.Q3: Resume preserves session_id with new claude PID (probe v2 confirmed).
empirical_resolutions_rev2.Q4_compaction: Deferred — defensive default branch handles unrecognized source values

challenge_rev1.findings_carried_forward: All 20 in adversarial.md; rev2 spec addresses each in addressed_findings list (state.json)

open_questions.OQ-rev2-1: Subagent compatibility — out of scope, document in debrief
open_questions.OQ-rev2-2: Eval simulation fidelity — Stage 7 risk; subshell-with-PPID-propagation approach planned for WU8

work_graph_rev2.rev1_diff: WU1 expanded (3 new functions), WU2 expanded (source-branching, no uuidgen), WU5 split into 5a-d (per-file fix enumeration), WU6 + PLANNING-STORAGE.md, WU12 + Category 1+2+5
